description_long: This is a mid-century modern wooden sideboard or credenza, featuring a rich walnut finish and clean, angular lines. The front face displays a symmetrical arrangement with two large cabinet doors on either side and a central column of four drawers, each with integrated recessed handles. The sideboard stands on four tapered legs, giving it a slightly elevated and elegant appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, adding a natural texture and warmth to the piece. The back is plain, with two elongated cutouts likely for cable management, suggesting it could also serve as a media console. The overall construction appears sturdy and well-crafted, suitable for both storage and display in urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A mid-century modern walnut sideboard with two cabinet doors, four central drawers, and tapered legs, featuring visible wood grain and a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large cabinet doors, four central drawers with recessed handles, and the full width of the sideboard.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth, flat side panel, and the tapered profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain back with two elongated cutouts, likely for cable management.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a flat panel and tapered legs.
